mapper.sql: rt.re_id as rr_id, rt.title_level, rt.title_name, rt.evaluation_time, rt.new_title_flag, rt.attribute1, rt.attribute2, rt.attribute3, rt.enabled_flag, rt.id, rt.update_by, rt.create_time, rt.create_by, rt.update_time

${tAlias}.re_id as ${tAlias}_rr_id, ${tAlias}.title_level as ${tAlias}_title_level, ${tAlias}.title_name as ${tAlias}_title_name, ${tAlias}.evaluation_time as ${tAlias}_evaluation_time, ${tAlias}.new_title_flag as ${tAlias}_new_title_flag, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time
mapper.insert: insert into re_title (re_id, title_level, title_name, evaluation_time, new_title_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, update_by, create_time, create_by, update_time) values (#{recruitment.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{titleLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{titleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evaluationTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{newTitleFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update re_title set re_id = #{recruitment.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, title_level = #{titleLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, title_name = #{titleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, evaluation_time = #{evaluationTime,jdbcType=DATE}, new_title_flag = #{newTitleFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into re_title (re_id, title_level, title_name, evaluation_time, new_title_flag, enabled_flag, update_by, create_time, create_by, update_time) select rr.id, rrti.title_level, rrti.title_name, rrti.title_evaluation_time, 1, 1, rrti.update_by, rrti.create_time, rrti.create_by, rrti.update_time from re_recruitment_temp_interface rrti join re_recruitment rr on rrti.id = convert(bigint, rr.attribute4) and convert(bigint, rr.attribute5) = rrti.group_id and rrti.group_id = #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and rrti.data_status = 'T' and isnull(rrti.title_name, '') <> ''
